b4f61999-d68e-472e-ba68-3e0a0aadc6cd.label: text_chunk
b4f61999-d68e-472e-ba68-3e0a0aadc6cd.text:
MUTUAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This MUTUAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT (“Agreement”) made this _____ day of _____ 20___, between YOUR COMPANY having a principal place of business at YOUR COMPANY ADDRESS and ____________________,whose principal address is ___________________________________________________.WHEREAS :  To determine the feasibility of a commercial relationship, the parties will be having discussions relating to both parties' business and technology.

e007f62c-ca6d-4ed7-a705-a136e7416658.label: text_chunk
e007f62c-ca6d-4ed7-a705-a136e7416658.text:
It is contemplated that to make such a determination, each party may disclose certain information to the other in confidence.

NOW THEREFORE, in consideration of mutual promises and covenants contained in this Agreement and the disclosure of Confidential Information to each other, the parties to this Agreement agree as follows:

1. Definition.

a7e48a1a-f9b9-4974-92ca-78e5a31178a6.label: text_chunk
a7e48a1a-f9b9-4974-92ca-78e5a31178a6.text: The term "Confidential Information" as used herein means all trade secrets or confidential or proprietary information of either party, whether or not marked “Confidential”, whether in written or oral form, relating to such party's business or technology, including without limitation, its products, customer data, development and marketing plans, and financial information.

43061d8d-83fd-4ab7-a5e9-3365e0fefe62.label: text_chunk
43061d8d-83fd-4ab7-a5e9-3365e0fefe62.text:
In addition, Confidential Information shall include all terms and conditions of this Agreement including the fact that the parties are having discussions in order to determine the feasibility of a commercial relationship.

2. Non-Disclosure of Confidential Information.

343d4ded-455b-49c4-bbac-a97b0207b667.label: text_chunk
343d4ded-455b-49c4-bbac-a97b0207b667.text: The party receiving Confidential Information (the “Receiving Party”) shall not disclose Confidential Information to any third party without the prior written consent of the party disclosing such confidential information (the “Disclosing Party”) and shall restrict dissemination of Confidential Information within its own organization to those employees who have a need to have access to the Confidential Information.

c51b83f8-2c3f-48c0-a0d5-de58a3f39cae.label: text_chunk
c51b83f8-2c3f-48c0-a0d5-de58a3f39cae.text: The Receiving Party agrees to protect Confidential Information by using the same degree of care as it would use to protect its own information of like importance, but in no case less than reasonable care.  Any use of Confidential Information shall be solely for the purpose authorized above.  Each party shall take appropriate measures, and in no event less than reasonable measures, by instruction and agreement prior to disclosure to such employees to assure against unauthorized use or disclosure.

9bbf4180-d752-497e-a0a1-95ec5a0f0a1d.label: text_chunk
9bbf4180-d752-497e-a0a1-95ec5a0f0a1d.text:
The Receiving Party agrees not to reverse engineer, disassemble, or otherwise restructure and/or copy or in any way recreate in whole or in part any Confidential Information of the Disclosing Party.

3. Exceptions to Confidential Information.

 The Receiving Party shall have no obligation with respect to information which: (i) was rightfully in possession of or known to the Receiving Party without any obligation of confidentiality prior to receiving it from the Disclosing Party,

222e5cad-4bc1-46bf-837f-b0d15ae703b0.label: text_chunk
222e5cad-4bc1-46bf-837f-b0d15ae703b0.text: as evidenced by the Receiving Party’s records; (ii) is or becomes part of the public domain without breach of this Agreement by Receiving Party; (iii) becomes known or available to Receiving Party from a source other than the Disclosing Party with the legal right to use and disclose such information; (iv) is independently developed by the Receiving Party without use of the Confidential Information;

d95c200e-58e3-40df-8d63-4b6ec722871d.label: text_chunk
d95c200e-58e3-40df-8d63-4b6ec722871d.text:
or (v) is disclosed by the Receiving Party pursuant to a valid order  issued by a court or government agency, provided, however, that the Receiving Party provides the Disclosing Party: (a) prior written notice of such obligation; and (b) the opportunity to oppose such disclosure or obtain a protective order.

4. Return or Destruction of Confidential Information.

8979a5b6-e208-45bc-b673-874b35771886.label: text_chunk
8979a5b6-e208-45bc-b673-874b35771886.text:
Upon written demand by the Disclosing Party,

 the Receiving Party shall: (i) cease using the Confidential Information; (ii) promptly return the Confidential Information and all copies, notes or extracts thereof to the Disclosing Party within seven (7) days of receipt of demand; and/or (iii) upon request of the Disclosing Party, destroy all such Confidential Information, including copies thereof, and shall furnish the Disclosing Party with written certification of destruction.

5.

0828bead-74b1-4d5d-8429-735d7386b649.label: text_chunk
0828bead-74b1-4d5d-8429-735d7386b649.text:
Injunctive Relief.

 The provisions of this Agreement are necessary for the protection of the business of each party and are considered by the other party to be reasonable for such purpose.

6cd3926c-0134-4242-9b16-90db2f338f28.label: text_chunk
6cd3926c-0134-4242-9b16-90db2f338f28.text:
Each party agrees that any breach of this Agreement may cause the other party substantial and irreparable damages and, therefore, in the event of any such breach, in addition to other remedies that may be available, each party shall have the right to seek specific performance and other injunctive and equitable relief against the other.

6. Ownership and Disclaimer. Each party shall retain all right,

 title and interest to such party’s Confidential Information disclosed to the other party.

696ebde7-1b57-4392-9844-01669f161f7b.label: text_chunk
696ebde7-1b57-4392-9844-01669f161f7b.text: Subject only to the Receiving Party’s limited use of the Confidential Information for the purpose set forth above, the Receiving Party acknowledges and agrees that nothing in this Agreement shall be construed as granting or implying any rights, license or otherwise, to any Confidential Information disclosed pursuant to this Agreement whether under any trademark, patent or copyright, or application of same which are now or thereafter may be obtained by such party.

ca0f7021-5fd8-416a-a789-06be26b136e9.label: text_chunk
ca0f7021-5fd8-416a-a789-06be26b136e9.text:
The Receiving Party shall not violate any of the Disclosing Party’s intellectual property or other rights in or to the Confidential Information.ALL CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION IS PROVIDED “AS IS” WITHOUT ANY REPRESENTATIONS OR WARRANTIES, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, THE IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY OR FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.  IN NO EVENT SHALL THE DISCLOSING PARTY BE LIABLE FOR THE ACCURACY OR COMPLETENESS OF ANY CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION.

7.

9f3c6bc4-c331-487b-a8aa-24d80736825d.label: text_chunk
9f3c6bc4-c331-487b-a8aa-24d80736825d.text:
Term.

 This Agreement shall remain in effect for a period of five (5) years from the Effective Date hereof.

8. No Obligation to Do Business.

 Each party acknowledges and agrees that nothing in this Agreement shall impose upon either party any obligation to consummate a transaction.

b63bb152-42af-4cd4-a296-60179e82b5da.label: text_chunk
b63bb152-42af-4cd4-a296-60179e82b5da.text:
Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, discussions and communications between the parties hereto shall not impair the right of either party to develop, make, use, procure and/or market any products or services (now or in the future) which may be competitive with those offered by the other party, provided none of the foregoing activities violate the terms of this Agreement.

9. General

9.1 Severability.

132f5d38-ea64-4031-a1ac-7b524e47f34e.label: text_chunk
132f5d38-ea64-4031-a1ac-7b524e47f34e.text:
The provisions of this Agreement shall be deemed severable,

 and the invalidity or unenforceability of any one or more of the provisions herein shall not affect the validity or enforceability of other provisions herein.

9.2 Choice of Laws.

e632bf5c-e3dd-44e0-920d-7cdb91db2d0b.label: text_chunk
e632bf5c-e3dd-44e0-920d-7cdb91db2d0b.text: The laws of the State of YOUR COMPANY STATE shall govern the validity, construction and performance of this Agreement, provided, however, that no choice of law or rule of the State of YOUR COMPANY STATE, or any other jurisdiction, which would cause any such matter to be referred to the law of any jurisdiction other than YOUR COMPANY STATE shall be given any force or effect.

4e693d21-9251-4d1e-902f-64bda6c01c23.label: text_chunk
4e693d21-9251-4d1e-902f-64bda6c01c23.text: Any legal action or proceeding with respect to this Agreement must be brought in the courts of the State of YOUR COMPANY STATE located in YOUR COMPANY STATE CAPITAL, YOUR COMPANY STATE or the courts of the United States of America for the Northern District of YOUR COMPANY STATE, and, by execution and delivery of this Agreement, each party hereby accepts for itself and in respect of its property, generally and unconditionally, the jurisdiction of the aforesaid courts.

bde67520-7481-41d3-b4ae-60b433d3ba1a.label: text_chunk
bde67520-7481-41d3-b4ae-60b433d3ba1a.text:
The parties hereto hereby irrevocably waive any objection, including, without limitation, any objection to the laying of venue or based on the grounds of forum non conveniens, that any party may now or hereafter have to the bringing of any such action or proceeding in such jurisdictions.

9.3 Notice .

669b63c2-6db7-448f-95d8-af8e570f9d1a.label: text_chunk
669b63c2-6db7-448f-95d8-af8e570f9d1a.text:
Any notice, approval, request, authorization,

 direction or other communication required or permitted under this Agreement shall be given in writing and shall be deemed to have been delivered: (i) one (1) business day after deposit with a commercial overnight courier with written verification of receipt; or (ii) five (5) business days after the mailing date if sent by U.S. mail, return receipt requested, postage and charges prepaid.

a52d9cf1-a225-440f-ab33-9ccce83c235b.label: text_chunk
a52d9cf1-a225-440f-ab33-9ccce83c235b.text:
Notice shall be given to each party at the addresses

set forth above. 9.4 Assignment and Delegation.

 This Agreement shall not be assignable by either party, without the prior written consent of the other party.  Any purported or attempted assignment hereof without such written consent shall be void and of no force or effect.  This Agreement shall inure to the benefit of any successors.

9.5 No Waiver.

b902475f-7e45-4b15-85b7-3bcbef9839a2.label: text_chunk
b902475f-7e45-4b15-85b7-3bcbef9839a2.text:
No waiver by either party of any breach or default of any of the covenants or agreements herein contained shall be deemed a waiver as to any subsequent or similar breach or default.  No right or remedy herein conferred upon either party is exclusive of any other right or remedy herein or by law or in equity provided or permitted.

9.6 Entire Agreement.

936fd629-feb0-422c-86a2-7824dd620c19.label: text_chunk
936fd629-feb0-422c-86a2-7824dd620c19.text:
This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties hereto pertaining to the subject matter hereof, and is the final, complete and exclusive expression of the terms and conditions thereof.  All prior or contemporaneous agreements, representations, negotiations and understandings of the parties hereto, oral or written, express or implied, are hereby superseded and merged herein.

9.7 Amendments and Modifications .

ec716807-c823-4988-bd3d-3cd9ebeabc77.label: text_chunk
ec716807-c823-4988-bd3d-3cd9ebeabc77.text:
No amendment, modification,

 or supplement to this Agreement shall be binding on any party unless it is in writing and signed by the parties.IN WITNESS WHEREOF , the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first written above. community_summary.0:
**Summary of Relationships:**

- **Entities Involved:** YOUR COMPANY and an unnamed party.
- **Relationship Description:** YOUR COMPANY is currently engaged in discussions with the unnamed party to explore a potential commercial relationship. This engagement is formalized by a mutual non-disclosure agreement, indicating a commitment to confidentiality during the negotiation process.
community_summary.1: The relationship between "YOUR COMPANY ADDRESS" and the unnamed entity is characterized by their distinct business locations. "YOUR COMPANY ADDRESS" serves as the official location for YOUR COMPANY, while the unnamed party maintains a separate principal address. This indicates that both entities operate independently at different addresses, highlighting the importance of their respective locations in the context of their business operations.
community_summary.2:
The relationships among the entities highlight the dynamics of legal agreements and the responsibilities of the parties involved. 

1. **Parties and Agreements**: Each party is bound by the terms and conditions of the Agreement, indicating a mutual commitment to uphold the stipulations outlined within it.

2. **Ownership of Confidential Information**: Each party retains ownership of their own Confidential Information shared with the other, emphasizing a relationship built on trust and the necessity to protect sensitive data.

3. **Waiver of Rights**: The concept of a waiver is significant for the parties involved in a legal agreement, as it pertains to the relinquishment of certain rights, which is a critical aspect of their legal relationship.

Overall, these relationships underscore the importance of trust, ownership, and the legal implications of waivers in the context of agreements between parties.
community_summary.3:
The relationships outlined involve a Disclosing Party and a Receiving Party, centered around the handling of Confidential Information. 

1. **Disclosing Party and Receiving Party**: The Disclosing Party shares Confidential Information with the Receiving Party, which is obligated to maintain its confidentiality. This establishes a trust-based relationship where the Disclosing Party is the source of sensitive information.

2. **Confidentiality Obligations**: The Receiving Party is bound to keep the information confidential, highlighting the importance of trust and responsibility in the exchange of sensitive data.

3. **Authority of the Disclosing Party**: The Disclosing Party retains the authority to demand the return or destruction of the Confidential Information, ensuring that they can control the dissemination and usage of the information after its disclosure.

Overall, the relationships emphasize the critical nature of confidentiality, the responsibilities of both parties, and the Disclosing Party's control over the sensitive information shared.
community_summary.4:
The relationships outlined in the knowledge graph highlight the significance of Confidential Information within the context of proprietary information and legal agreements. 

1. **Confidential Information** is a broad category that **includes Trade Secrets**, indicating that trade secrets are a subset of confidential information, which is protected from disclosure.

2. **Confidential Information** is identified as a specific type of **Proprietary Information**, encompassing various forms of sensitive data related to a business.

3. **Confidential Information** is also a critical component of an **Agreement**, as it encompasses all terms and conditions outlined in the document, emphasizing its importance in legal contexts.

Overall, the relationships illustrate that Confidential Information serves as a foundational element in protecting sensitive business data, including trade secrets, and plays a vital role in legal agreements.
community_summary.5:
The relationships among the entities involved in an Agreement can be summarized as follows:

1. **Parties and Agreement**: The parties are the entities that engage in discussions regarding the Agreement, emphasizing their active role in the contractual relationship.

2. **Obligations of Parties**: The parties are bound by the terms and conditions outlined in the Agreement, which define their respective rights and responsibilities.

Overall, the summary highlights that the parties not only participate in the formation of the Agreement but are also legally obligated to adhere to its stipulations, underscoring the significance of their involvement in the contractual framework.
community_summary.6:
**Summary of Relationships:**

1. **Receiving Party and Disclosing Party**: The Receiving Party is engaged in a relationship with the Disclosing Party, characterized by the exchange of Confidential Information. This relationship is foundational, as it establishes the basis for the handling of sensitive information.

2. **Protection of Confidential Information**: The Receiving Party has a duty to protect the Confidential Information received from the Disclosing Party. This obligation requires the Receiving Party to exercise a specified degree of care to ensure the information remains secure.

3. **Notification Obligations**: The Receiving Party is required to notify the Disclosing Party in writing before disclosing any Confidential Information, ensuring that the Disclosing Party is aware of potential disclosures.

4. **Disclosure Requirements**: In circumstances where a valid court order mandates disclosure, the Receiving Party must comply and provide the required information, highlighting the legal obligations that may override confidentiality agreements.

Overall, these relationships underscore the importance of confidentiality, the responsibilities of the Receiving Party in safeguarding sensitive information, and the legal frameworks that govern disclosures.
community_summary.7: The relationship between "Injunctive Relief" and "Agreement" highlights that Injunctive Relief is frequently pursued through an Agreement. This legal mechanism is utilized to ensure that the terms outlined in the Agreement are adhered to, thereby safeguarding the interests of the parties involved. The emphasis is on the protective nature of Injunctive Relief in the context of contractual obligations.

2. **Governance**: It governs the parties by outlining the terms and conditions that dictate their interactions and obligations.
3. **Provisions**: The Agreement contains various Provisions that detail the agreed-upon terms and conditions.
4. **Benefit**: It is designed to benefit the parties, ensuring that the terms protect and serve their interests.

Overall, the Agreement serves as a comprehensive framework that establishes the timeline, rules, and protections for the parties involved.

This highlights a significant aspect of the relationship, emphasizing that both parties have the freedom to choose whether or not to proceed with the transaction without any binding obligation.

community_summary.19: The Whistleblower Protection Act is a significant piece of legislation that amends Title 5 of the United States Code. Its primary purpose is to enhance protections for whistleblowers, ensuring that individuals who report misconduct or illegal activities are safeguarded from retaliation. This relationship underscores the Act's role in promoting transparency and accountability within organizations by providing legal protections to those who come forward with critical information.
community_summary.20: The Intelligence Identities Protection Act is connected to Title 5 through their shared status as components of the United States Code. Both pieces of legislation focus on government accountability and the safeguarding of sensitive information, highlighting their significance in the realm of national security and the protection of intelligence identities.
community_summary.21: The relationship between Government agents and the Subversive Activities Act of 1950 is characterized by protective measures. This highlights the significance of the Act in ensuring the safety and security of individuals working in sensitive governmental roles.
community_summary.22:
The relationships involving the Protected Critical Infrastructure Information (PCII) highlight the management and ownership dynamics surrounding this sensitive information category. 

1. **PCII and PCII Program Manager**: The PCII Program Manager is responsible for overseeing the PCII program, ensuring its operations and compliance. This indicates a management relationship where the Program Manager plays a crucial role in the program's governance.

2. **Authorization by PCII Program Manager**: The PCII Program Manager holds the authority to authorize any changes or removals of PCII, establishing a direct and significant relationship between the manager and the information category.

3. **Ownership by the United States Government**: The PCII is owned by the entity that possesses it, specifically including the United States Government. This ownership implies that the government is a key stakeholder in the management and disclosure of PCII.

In summary, the PCII Program Manager is central to the management and authorization processes of PCII, while the United States Government holds ownership, underscoring the importance of governance and compliance in handling this critical information.
community_summary.23: The relationship between "Sensitive but Unclassified Information" and "Section 552a of Title 5" highlights the legal framework that safeguards individual privacy rights. Specifically, Section 552a of Title 5 governs sensitive but unclassified information, establishing the necessary protections for personal privacy. This relationship underscores the importance of legal guidelines in managing and protecting sensitive information that does not meet the criteria for classified status but still requires careful handling to ensure privacy rights are upheld.
community_summary.24:
The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) plays a crucial role in managing and protecting sensitive information related to national security. It categorizes information as For Official Use Only (FOUO) to safeguard it from public disclosure, ensuring that sensitive details remain confidential. Additionally, DHS manages Sensitive Homeland Security Information (SHSI) to uphold national security and public safety. 

Furthermore, DHS has the authority over Authorized Individuals, who are designated personnel empowered to request the return of information from those who have accessed it, reinforcing the security protocols associated with DHS operations. Overall, these relationships underscore DHS's commitment to protecting sensitive information and maintaining national security.
community_summary.25:
The relationships outlined highlight the regulatory and enforcement dynamics between the United States Government and an Authorized Entity concerning DHS Form 11000-6 and Protected Critical Infrastructure Information (PCII).

1. **Regulation of DHS Form 11000-6**: The United States Government regulates the use and compliance of DHS Form 11000-6, which pertains to the handling and safeguarding of information under specific agreements.

2. **Authorization of the Authorized Entity**: The United States Government grants authority to the Authorized Entity, enabling it to enforce agreements and manage disclosures related to PCII.

3. **Enforcement Mechanisms**: The United States Government retains the right to seek remedies against the Authorized Entity to ensure compliance with the terms of the Agreement, establishing a legal oversight relationship.

In summary, the United States Government plays a crucial role in regulating information handling through DHS Form 11000-6, authorizing an entity to manage sensitive information, and enforcing compliance to maintain the integrity of agreements related to critical infrastructure information.

The relationships outlined highlight significant connections between various legal frameworks and protections concerning disclosures and employee rights.

1. **Executive Order No. 12958 and Section 7211 of Title 5**: Both establish guidelines and obligations regarding disclosures to Congress, emphasizing the importance of transparency and accountability in the context of employee rights and responsibilities.

2. **Section 1034 of Title 10 and the Military Whistleblower Protection Act**: Section 1034 specifically protects military members who disclose information, while the Military Whistleblower Protection Act reinforces these protections, illustrating a strong commitment to safeguarding the rights of military personnel in reporting misconduct or wrongdoing.

In summary, these relationships underscore the critical role of legal provisions in ensuring that both civilian and military employees are protected when making disclosures, thereby promoting a culture of accountability and integrity within government and military operations.

community_summary.35:
The relationships outlined highlight the City’s proactive approach to managing infrastructure and securing funding for various projects. 

1. **Funding Relationships**: The City receives financial support from Measure W, which is utilized to enhance its projects. Additionally, the City actively applies for funding from the State, particularly through programs like the State Revolving Fund, to bolster its financial resources.

2. **Project Management**: The City is responsible for managing the Marie Canyon Green Streets project, indicating its role in overseeing urban development initiatives as part of its Capital Improvement Program. Furthermore, the City oversees the City Hall Roof Replacement project, showcasing its commitment to maintaining local infrastructure.

3. **Collaboration for Improvement**: The City collaborates with FEMA to develop a storm drain inventory, leveraging federal funding to improve infrastructure in response to challenges posed by events such as the Woolsey Fire.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the City’s strategic efforts in funding acquisition, project management, and collaboration with federal agencies to enhance community infrastructure and resilience.
